steps.name: queue-domain
steps.summary: QueueProperties + V6 seed(queueEnabled=true 공연 id=2) + QueueService(ZADD NX·ZRANK·ETA·공연 시작+1시간 TTL) + POST /queue/{showId}/enter + GET /queue/{showId}/me + ErrorCode 2종(QUEUE_NOT_ENABLED·NOT_IN_QUEUE) + 통합 9 시나리오

steps.name: admit-worker
steps.summary: AdmitWorker @Scheduled fixedDelayString(tick-interval-sec*1000ms) + runOnce(public, public for IT) + ZPOPMIN admits-per-tick → SADD admit:{showId} + admit TTL 600s + 공연별 try/catch + 비원자성 명시. 통합 IT(정상·tick 제한·flag 무시·TTL 검증)

steps.name: reservation-gate
steps.summary: ReservationService.reserve에 queueEnabled=true 공연 SISMEMBER admit 게이트 추가 + ErrorCode NOT_ADMITTED + 통합 IT(admit 없이 거부·queue→admit→reserve 정상·queueEnabled=false 우회 회귀)
